project_type: Pine Script v6 TradingView indicator collection
build_system: None - TradingView compiles scripts directly. Validation is syntactic review only.
test_framework: No automated tests - scripts are validated by TradingView compiler. Manual review for syntax correctness.
build_command: N/A - no local build toolchain for Pine Script
test_command: N/A - scripts validated by TradingView compiler only
verification_instructions: 1. Review the script for Pine Script v6 syntax correctness. 2. Check that all required features are present. 3. Verify the script follows conventions in .kiro/steering/pine-script.md. 4. Confirm file is placed in indicators/ directory with .pine extension.
setup_instructions: No setup required - this is a Pine Script project with no local dependencies.
environment_constraints: No local Pine Script compiler available. Validation is code review and AST-level correctness only. Cannot execute or test Pine Script locally.
contribution_requirements: Use Pine Script v6 (//@version=6). Follow naming conventions (camelCase for vars, UPPER_SNAKE_CASE for constants). Place indicators in indicators/ directory with kebab-case .pine filenames. Use section comments (// --- Section Name ---). Inputs at top after indicator declaration. Plots/alerts at end.
key_patterns: UDTs (User Defined Types) for structured data. var keyword for persistent state. Arrays for dynamic collections. request.security() with barmerge.lookahead_off for non-repainting MTF data. Input groups with string GRP_NAME pattern. Extensive use of color.new() for transparency. box/line/label drawing objects for visual zones.
directory_structure: indicators/ - Pine Script indicator files (.pine). .kiro/steering/ - project conventions and rules.
